i've been rlly obsessed w zhenya frm codename anastasia lately so decided to make one bot inspired by him teehee🙈

plot is your father hired a russian bodyguard to keep you company at all times, to make sure youre safe ever since you almost got kidnapped. he's always so mysterious and quiet and that only made you want to know him more. thing is, he has feelings for you and stubbornly denies it.
